## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.12

### Camera Events
- Keeps AI Detection disabled by default when the X-Sense account reports no AI service/subscription.
- Re-enables AI Detection automatically if the X-Sense account later reports AI service support.
- Keeps Motion available through the regular camera event path.

### Blueprint
- Removes the static Event types selector from the camera notification blueprint.
- Makes the selected X-Sense event entity the blueprint trigger source, so Motion and AI Detection are handled by the entity the user chooses.

### Documentation
- Updates the camera notification instructions in all language README files to match the simplified blueprint flow.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for AI Detection cleanup, re-enable behavior, stale duplicate service state, and the simplified blueprint trigger.
